case_title: EARWAX PRODUCTIONS, INC. VS CALIFORNIA DIRECT et al

docket_entries.description: DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DIRECT COBALT CREATIVE ACTION DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-30-2006, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-22-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DIRECT
CONTINUED TO 2/26/07 AT 3:30 P.M. PER SETTLEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DIRECT COBALT CREATIVE

CERTIFIED MAIL TO JEFF SOBUL, PRINCIPAL COBALT CREATIVE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EARWAX PRODUCTIONS, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DIRECT COBALT CREATIVE DEFECTIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DIRECT. PLAINTIFF MAY RESET THIS CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EFFECT SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DIRECT BY SERVING ITS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS KEVIN C. BROWN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
